inputs.label: Paid Dividends
inputs.businessContext: Total amount of dividends paid to shareholders in the period (e.g., quarterly or annually).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total amount of dividends paid to shareholders in the period (e.g., quarterly or annually).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönemde (örneğin üç aylık veya yıllık) hissedarlara ödenen toplam temettü tutarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtbetrag der im Zeitraum (z. B. vierteljährlich oder jährlich) an die Aktionäre gezahlten Dividenden.

inputs.label: Net Income
inputs.businessContext: Company’s net income (profit after all expenses) for the same period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Company’s net income (profit after all expenses) for the same period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şirketin aynı dönemdeki net geliri (tüm giderler sonrası kar).
businessContext_i18n.de: Nettogewinn des Unternehmens (Gewinn nach allen Ausgaben) für denselben Zeitraum.

inputs.label: Dividends Per Share
inputs.businessContext: Dividends paid per outstanding share (alternative numerator for per-share calculation).

businessContext_i18n.en: Dividends paid per outstanding share (alternative numerator for per-share calculation).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ödenmemiş hisse başına ödenen temettü (hisse başına hesaplama için alternatif pay).
businessContext_i18n.de: Pro ausstehende Aktie gezahlte Dividende (alternativer Zähler für die Berechnung pro Aktie).

inputs.label: Earnings Per Share
inputs.businessContext: Earnings per share for the period (alternative denominator for per-share calculation).

businessContext_i18n.en: Earnings per share for the period (alternative denominator for per-share calculation).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönem için hisse başına kazanç (hisse başına hesaplama için alternatif payda).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewinn pro Aktie für den Zeitraum (alternativer Nenner für die Berechnung pro Aktie).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
